summary: Tested new StatMoose features: Season creation with gender/level, Edit Season, Delete Season with password, School ID code, Find School search, and Link roster import. Backend: 14/15 tests pass. Frontend: All UI features verified working. One critical issue: /api/team/scrape-roster endpoint is MISSING.

critical.issue: Endpoint does not exist (404). Frontend calls this endpoint for 'From Website' roster import but backend has no handler.

integration_issues.issue: Import button in 'From Website' tab calls /api/team/scrape-roster which returns 404

action_items: CRITICAL: Create /api/team/scrape-roster endpoint in backend to handle website roster scraping. Frontend at SeasonManagement.jsx line 480 calls this endpoint.
critical_code_review_comments: Missing backend endpoint: /api/team/scrape-roster - Frontend expects this endpoint but it doesn't exist in server.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features work except Link Roster Import which needs backend endpoint /api/team/scrape-roster to be created.

create_season_dialog.details: Create Season dialog shows Sport, Gender (Men's/Women's), Level (Varsity/Sub-Varsity), and Season Name fields. All dropdowns work correctly.

school_id_code.details: Edit School tab shows School ID Code field (read-only) with copy button. School code 'MOOSEA' displayed correctly with helper text.

edit_season_dialog.details: Edit Season dialog opens from Opponents tab. Shows Season Name input, sport/gender/level info (read-only), Save Changes and Delete Season buttons.

delete_season_dialog.details: Delete Season dialog requires password confirmation. Shows warning about permanent deletion, lists what will be deleted, has Password input field.

find_school_dialog.details: Find School dialog allows searching by name or school code. Shows search results with school logo, name, code, state, and Add button.

school_search_api.details: Backend search endpoint works correctly. Supports search by name or code, with optional sport/gender/level filters.

link_roster_import_ui.details: From Website tab in roster dialog shows URL input and Import button. UI is correct.

link_roster_import_api.details: MISSING ENDPOINT - Returns 404. Frontend expects this endpoint but it doesn't exist in backend.

season_create_api.details: Backend correctly validates gender (men/women) and level (varsity/subvarsity). Creates season with all fields.

season_delete_api.details: Backend correctly requires password confirmation. Rejects wrong password (401), accepts correct password and deletes season.

screenshots: .screenshots/create_season_dialog.png - Create Season dialog with Sport, Gender, Level dropdowns
.screenshots/edit_school_tab.png - Edit School tab showing School ID Code 'MOOSEA'
.screenshots/opponents_tab.png - Opponents tab with Edit Season, Find School, Add Opponent buttons
.screenshots/edit_season_dialog.png - Edit Season dialog with name field and delete button
.screenshots/delete_season_dialog.png - Delete Season confirmation with password field
.screenshots/from_website_tab.png - From Website tab for roster import
